subject: Your Thursday OS Beta Invitation Approved
body:
Welcome to Thursday, Alice Tester!

Your request for Closed Beta access has been approved.

Windows Unified Installer

Download link: thursday_setup.exe (v0.9.0 Beta)

Installation Guide

  1. Download the executable: thursday_setup.exe.
  2. Launch the installer and accept security prompts.
  3. Login with your approved email: alice@tester.com.

Discord Community

Join other beta testers on our Discord: discord.gg/thursday

Feedback & Bug Report Form

Report issues directly using: forms.gle/thursday-beta

Release Notes (v0.9.0 Beta)

  • Three.js core liquid-glass rendering.
  • Autonomous scheduling and calendar integrations.
  • Zero-latency local indexing of project vectors.

subject: Your Thursday OS Beta Invitation Approved
body:
THURSDAY OS

Welcome to the Future, John Doe

Your request for early access to the Thursday Closed Beta has been approved. The planner engine and spatial identity core are ready to initialize.

Download Installer (v0.9.0)
Installation Guide
  1. Download the unified Windows executable: thursday_setup.exe.
  2. Launch the installer and accept all system security prompts.
  3. Authenticate your login using your approved email: testwaitlist@gmail.com.
💬 WhatsApp Beta Community
Join our exclusive WhatsApp community to share feedback, report bugs, and interact with the founders directly.
Join WhatsApp Community →
Release notes (v0.9.0 Beta)
Three.js core liquid-glass rendering • Autonomous scheduling and calendar integrations • Zero-latency local vector indexing.
Thursday OS • Secure Beta Channel • Control Room Dispatch
